chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ تَزَوَّجَ اِمْرَأَةً بِحُكْمِهَا ثُمَّ مَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَحْكُمَ قَالَ "لَيْسَ لَهَا صَدَاقٌ وَ هِيَ تَرِثُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4450 - Safwan ibn Yahya narrated from Abu Ja'far with reference to Mird'ah:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who married a woman based on her terms but then died before she made her decision (regarding the terms).
Imam (as) said: "She is not entitled to a dowry (sadaq), but she inherits from him."
